    Breakaway: A BookTok Sensation Spicy Hockey Romance – The Coach's Forbidden Daughter and a Star Athlete Fall in Love (Beyond the Play Book 2) Kindle Edition

    by Grace Reilly (Author) Format: Kindle Edition
    4.1 4.1 out of 5 stars (15,063)
    Book 2 of 4: Beyond the Play
    Best of #BookTok
    Sorry, there was a problem loading this page. Try again.
    See all formats and editions

    USA Today Bestseller

    The BookTok sensation: a spicy coach’s daughter college sports romance, second in the Beyond the Play series, with new exclusive content in this edition!

    A secret friends-with-benefits arrangement with the hockey coach’s daughter shouldn’t have a shot in the dark of leading to more…

    Cooper

    As a pro-bound college athlete with a good-time reputation, I usually have my pick of puck bunnies. But lately, I’ve been in a dry spell that feels more like a curse, and the stress is affecting my game—the one thing that can’t happen if I’m going to make team captain, and eventually the NHL.

    Enter Penny Ryder.

    She’s my coach’s daughter, but the moment she pulls me into that ice rink closet, she’s the one thing on my mind besides hockey. She has a sex bucket list, and each item on it confirms we’re kindred spirits in the bedroom. If I say yes, I’ll be relaxed on the ice again—but if her dad finds out, I’ll be forced to say goodbye to being captain and finally earning my own father’s approval.

    Penny

    Thanks to the ex from hell, I’m a long way from being ready for a relationship—but it’s time to reclaim my agency, one long-sought-after experience in bed at a time.

    Enter Cooper Callahan.

    He’s my dad’s star defenseman; an arrangement with him will mean keeping yet another major secret from my father. But the agreement we strike is simple: secret friends-with-benefits until he makes captain…and I cross off everything on my list, so I can finally move on from the incident that ruined both my life and my figure skating career.

    Yet the longer our connection goes on, the more we trust each other, and the less I want to say goodbye. I know love leads to heartbreak, but what if it can also clear the ice for a breakaway?

    TROPES

    Friends with benefits

    Hockey Romance

    Spice Coaching

    Filled with swoons, spice coaching, sports, and book nerds in love, Breakaway is a don’t-miss adult college sports romance.

    Read more

    Editorial Reviews

    Review

    “When I’m craving sports romance with sparkling banter, delicious tension, and page-melting dirty talk, I reach for Grace Reilly’s Beyond the Play series every time. Grace Reilly is the queen of sports romance!” — —Stephanie Archer, nationally bestselling author of the Vancouver Storm series

    About the Author

    Grace Reilly is the USA Today bestselling author of swoony, spicy contemporary romances with heart—and usually a healthy dose of sports. When she’s not dreaming up stories, she can be found in the kitchen trying out a new recipe, cuddling her pack of dogs, or watching sports. Originally from New York, she now lives in Florida, which is troubling given her fear of alligators. She is the author of First Down, Breakaway, Stealing Home, and the forthcoming Wicked Serve, the college-set sports Beyond the Play series about the Callahan siblings.

    How customer reviews and ratings work

    Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

    To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

    Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon
    Sponsored

    Customers say

    Customers enjoy this college sports romance for its spicy scenes and how friendship blossoms into love. The story receives positive feedback for its plot and characters, with one customer noting how life struggles complement each other well. Customers appreciate the hilarious banter between characters and find it a fun read, with one describing it as a wonderful escape into the world of McKee University. The pacing receives mixed reactions, with some finding it perfect while others say it's slow.

    Amazon Customer
    5 out of 5 stars
    Spicy romance leaves you wanting more
    Okay, words cannot express how much I loved this book. I was hooked after reading first down and now I love both just as much. 10/10 recommend. 👌 Penny was a little sassy bookworm who was smart and strong. Loosing her mother at such a young age and what her first boyfriend did to her just shattered my heart. Cooper was that perfect book boyfriend to add to your list, he was so caring to Penny and the spice he’s got 🤤 but what I loved the most was how his father finally showed him his love for him. Feeling like his father didn’t love him nor was he proud of him - just to find out Cooper was totally wrong. It was such a touching story. What I loved: 💕The gummy bears! 💕Tangy the kitten! 💕The love for romance books! (Uh my favvvv) 💕The growth they both went through! Penny and Cooper - They helped each other become better. The ending left me wanting more. What’s next? A book about Mia and Seb? 😳 I can’t wait, Grace.. please give me some spoilers!
    MoreHide
    Thank you for your feedback
    Sorry, there was an error

    Top reviews from the United States

    There was a problem filtering reviews. Please reload the page.

    • McKinley Devine
      5.0 out of 5 stars My new favorite sports romance
      Reviewed in the United States on October 7, 2023
      Verified Purchase
      Penny Ryder is a girl on a mission to reclaim control of her life and sexual experiences through a well-thought-out list of sexual adventures she is ready to embark on. The problem? The only person she wants to team up with for the list is the star of her dad's ice hockey team, Cooper Callahan. The good news? Neither of them is looking for a relationship and he’s desperate to clear his head and end his dry spell, allowing him to give his all on the ice. A secret friends-with-benefits arrangement will enable them to get what they need, but it quickly becomes apparent that this is about more than focusing on the game or checking off a list.

      Grace Reilly set the stage for this series with First Down, focused on Cooper’s brother James. But Breakaway stands out among the two. Cooper Callahan is the ideal book boyfriend, the kind who makes you weak in the knees as you read. He’s the typical tall dark and handsome hockey star we have come to love in sports romance novels but with an added praise kink that takes him to the next level. Truly, other authors should take notes from the magnificent dirty talk Reilly incorporates into this book. It is a MUST-read if you enjoy praise and dirty talk.

      Penny Ryder is a female main character that too many women will be able to identify with. She has a complex backstory that has led to a significant amount of distrust surrounding sex. Grace Reilly tackles the topic of broken trust in an artful way, never allowing it to feel pandering or unrealistic. I am truly grateful for the story she chose to tell and how she told it. Despite the heavy topic, it never weighs down the book or the characters, and instead allows them to have significant periods of growth and progress.

      The spicy scenes in this book are plentiful and each one is steamier than the one before it. It quickly became one of my favorite spicy books I’ve read and I am eager to see what else comes from this author. The two main characters play with several different kinky situations that remain realistic and fun. Praise is without a doubt one of the most prevalent, with plenty of “good girls” and “that’s my girl” throughout. Combined with some well-placed “brat” callouts, these scenes are a true standout in the genre.

      Although a standalone novel, I think the reader would benefit greatly from having read First Down for much-needed context into the Callahan family. The cameos from James and Bex were like little hugs throughout Breakaway but never felt forced or out of place
      Read more
      One person found this helpful
      Helpful
       Report
    • Krysten MA
      4.0 out of 5 stars New to me Author. New Love
      Reviewed in the United States on April 3, 2023
      Verified Purchase
      4.5 for First Down and 4 for Breakway.
      After 3 days, I just crawled out of a Grace Reilly book vortex. Yes, I picked up First Down which I loved so much that I just went right to Breakaway. James and Bex’s story is absolutely incredible and I highly recommend you read it first before starting Cooper and Penny’s story, though it’s not required. Grace is a new author to me and my KU recommendations showed her and I am a professional sports romance reader. Her worlds immediately draws you in. Her writing of characters instantly felt real or reminded me of someone I know. They felt like friends. Cooper and Penny have one of the more unique story lines for romance. Yes it’s a friends with benefits but there’s a lot more beneath it as Cooper needs to improve his hockey game to make the NHL and Penny has built an experience bucket list to help move on from some major past trauma. The catch? She is Coopers coach’s daughter. Their banter and relationship building is not only spicy but also hilarious. They have actual text conversations we all have with friends from meme sharing to Good Morning texts. Don’t let the cute cover fool you because Cooper and Penny are absolute fire together. Dirty talk, kink exploration, encouraging exploration. All there and all smoking hot. This has one of the best relationship arcs I’ve read in a long time. Even with their agreement and spicy times, the growth these two experience together is incredible. It’s not without it’s challengers and Penny had a very serious past trauma(check the warnings), the way it’s handled is excellent representation of mental health treatments. If you need excellent college sports romances, great story, hot spice, or great pallet cleanser, this series is a must read.
      Read more

    • Chelsea
      3.0 out of 5 stars this is a hard 3 star review
      Reviewed in the United States on June 23, 2024
      Format: KindleVerified Purchase
      While the story started off strong I feel like I got lost in the true plot. The uncle thing kind of was thrown in for a loop and not really necessary. Cooper started off as a strong character and then started making decisions that didn’t match up to who the author made him out to be in the beginning.

      Penny was relatable but again I felt like she got lost in the plot along with everything else going on.

      All in all it was okay

    • Kimberly Wyatt
      4.0 out of 5 stars 4 star read
      Reviewed in the United States on May 31, 2025
      Format: AudiobookVerified Purchase
      🌟🌟🌟🌟
      Book Review: Breakaway by Grace Reilly
      If you’re into hockey romances with heart, heat, and just the right touch of emotional depth, Breakaway scores big. Grace Reilly gives us a strong-willed heroine, a swoony athlete, and banter that actually delivers.

      It’s a slow burn that pays off, with just enough spice to keep the pages turning—and the emotional beats hit hard too. While a few moments felt a little predictable, the charm and chemistry more than made up for it.

      Perfect for fans of sports romance who love the tension of enemies-to-lovers with a soft center. 🏒💘

      #Breakaway #GraceReilly #SportsRomance #Bookstagram #HockeyRomance #RomanceReads

    Top reviews from other countries

    • Letícia Medeiros
      5.0 out of 5 stars One of the best book boyfriends ever
      Reviewed in Brazil on February 26, 2023
      Verified Purchase
      Honestly, I don't have the words to describe how much I fell in love with Cooper.

      his dynamic with Penny, how he fell in love with her, his personality, absolutely everything about this man is perfect.

      I loved getting to know the author's writing through this book, because I was honestly fascinated and just wanted to be able to read more and more of her books.

      Penny is amazing, smart, funny and the kind of person you know you could be friends with for life.

      If I could give a thousand stars I would.

    • Elle
      5.0 out of 5 stars Five shining stars for this gorgeous gorgeous book
      Reviewed in Italy on January 31, 2023
      Verified Purchase
      Five shining stars for this gorgeous gorgeous book.

      I had very high expectations for this one and OMG did Breakaway delivered!

      Tropes you'll find:
      - hockey romance
      - friends-with-benefits to lovers
      - coach's daughter
      - reformed player
      - no third-act breakup (I need this to become an official trope, please)

      Grace Reilly's writing and characterization is truly top-notch in this one. I was hooked from page one and binge read this in less than 48 hours. I honestly could not put this down.

      Cooper was truly the ultimate book-boyfriend: incredibly sweet, understanding, respectful of Penny's boundaries and needs and extremely supportive of her interests as passions.
      Penny was possibly one of my favourite heroines to date. She was a firecracker and her character's growth was a pleasure to read about.
      Their chemistry was off the freaking charts from the very beginning, constantly fuelled by their extremely entertaining banter. Absolute perfection.

      I've immediately added this gem to my favourite hockey romance books collection and I'm very excited for the next book in the series. It'll be my first ever baseball romance and I cannot wait to see what Grace Reilly has in store for Seb and Mia's story.
      Read more
      Report

      5⭐️ This book was soo much fun! I lived the characters and their storyline. The ✨spice✨ was also great🤌 If you liked Icebreaker by Hannah Grace you’ll definitely like this. Can’t wait for the third book in the series (they can be read as stand-alone’s

    • Jennifer Newman
      5.0 out of 5 stars Such a cute sports romance
      Reviewed in the United Kingdom on March 8, 2023
      Verified Purchase
      Breakaway
      🏒 Coach’s Daughter
      🏒 FWB
      🏒 Spice Coaching
      🏒 Hockey

      “It’s like I’ve been falling all my life, and I finally landed somewhere safe. You’re safe, and I love you. That’s the truth.”

      While it’s safe to say I absolutely LOVED the first book, this second book has blown me away.
      The spice in this book is just wow. It doesn’t overpower the story at all and showcases Penny’s character development so nicely! Copper is just the most Golden Retriever boyfriend with the filthiest mouth. Penny was such a strong character, she took charge of her exploration after a traumatic past. I can’t get enough of their relationship! They were so supportive and patient with each other and that ending definitely had me in happy tears!

      I can’t wait for Seb & Mia’s story next!
      Read more
